keywords.name: Is it true you don't know who I am? Well, then listen. My name is Malor. ...
keywords.job: I am the true leader of all djinn - perhaps not by birth, but certainly by merit. One day all djinn will come to recognise that I alone deserve to be king.
keywords.king: Ah yes. My good old friend the foolish orc. He has rendered me a great service, you know? He released me from that accursed lamp! ...
keywords.djinn: We are strong and proud. One day we will take our rightful place on the throne of creation, and your vulgar race will either serve us or perish. ...
keywords.gabel: That fool. He thought he'd got rid of me for good. But I'm back, and this time I will finish what I have begun. That weak-willed wimp has held on to power far too long.
keywords.efreet: We are djinn! The true djinn! Those who have not let themselves be fooled by the silver-tongued blathering of that perfidious snake called Daraman.
keywords.marid: The so-called Marid have forgotten what it is like to be djinn! They are weak!
keywords.malor: That is me. I was away for a long time, but now I am back with a vengeance.
keywords.daraman: Of all human liars and schemers he was the worst. This self-styled prophet single-handedly managed to disunite my race and to spark a bloody civil war. ...
keywords.human: Your race is weak, but incurably treacherous. I will never forgive humanity the fact that it was one of your kind who spread the seed of dissent among the djinn.
keywords.mal'ouquah: Do you like this place? I have built Mal'ouquah as a home for those among my kind who did not fall for Daraman's sugar covered lies. From here I shall rule the world when the time has come.
keywords.ashta'daramai: Ashta'daramai is the fortress of our sworn enemies, the oh so powerful Marid. The day will come when I see its smouldering walls collapse.
keywords.orc: Ah yes. My good old friend the foolish orc. He has rendered me a great service, you know? He released me from that accursed lamp! ...
keywords.zathroth: Our father. He made us a race of masters, not of servants. We will live to fulfill his promise or die trying.
keywords.gods: Are not the creators reflected in their creations? Look around! What do you see? There is nothing but cowardice and treachery in the world of humans. ...
keywords.tibia: The world of Tibia is ours by right. I will not rest until we have conquered it.
keywords.darashia: Darashia is a very rich city. Once this war is won I will drop by at the Caliph's palace and pay my respects, if you know what I mean.
keywords.scarab: Scarabs are ancient creatures, which is why I respect them. But I will never allow any of these critters to undermine the foundations of my fortress.
keywords.edron: I hear the humans have built impressive cities on the great continent. It looks like many things have changed while I was caught in that stupid lamp.
keywords.thais: I hear the humans have built impressive cities on the great continent. It looks like many things have changed while I was caught in that stupid lamp.
keywords.venore: I hear the humans have built impressive cities on the great continent. It looks like many things have changed while I was caught in that stupid lamp.
keywords.kazordoon: I hear the humans have built impressive cities on the great continent. It looks like many things have changed while I was caught in that stupid lamp.
keywords.carlin: I hear the humans have built impressive cities on the great continent. It looks like many things have changed while I was caught in that stupid lamp.
keywords.ab'dendriel: I hear the humans have built impressive cities on the great continent. It looks like many things have changed while I was caught in that stupid lamp.
keywords.ankrahmun: Even though it always was a human settlement I have always had a soft spot for the place. I am even thinking about making it my capital once I have taken over the world.
keywords.pharaoh: I have heard that pompous pharaoh believes himself to be some sort of deity. That pathetic bonehead a god? Don't make me laugh!
keywords.ascension: Ascension? That does ring a bell. Isn't that an element of the pharaoh's doctrines.
keywords.rah: Another one of that loony pharaoh's bright ideas. Nothing but nonsense and balderdash.
keywords.uthun: Another one of that loony pharaoh's bright ideas. Nothing but nonsense and balderdash.
keywords.akh: Another one of that loony pharaoh's bright ideas. Nothing but nonsense and balderdash.
keywords.kha'zeel: They say the Kha'zeel mountains have been made by gods. If that is true they must have left long ago, because I have lived here for eons, and I have never met one of them.
keywords.kha'labal: Kha'labal. I do not like that desert. Looking at it brings up bad memories.
keywords.war: Gabel and Fa'hradin thought the war was over when they managed to trap me in that accursed lamp. But they have been a bit rash. After all those years I'm still here, and my thirst for revenge is stronger than ever!
keywords.melchior: Melchior! Hah, that fool! Is he still alive? I never thought the old wretch would make it after I gave him my special treatment and sent him out into the Kha'labal. ...
keywords.baa'leal: I suppose you have met Baa'leal already? The fact that you have survived that encounter shows that you are surprisingly strong for a human. ...
keywords.alesar: I guess this is the first time I entrust a human with a mission. And such an important mission, too. But well, we live in hard times, and I am a bit short of adequate staff. ...
keywords.fa'hradin: Fa'hradin is Gabel's lieutenant. I have known him for a long time, and I have always respected him. ...
keywords.lamp: Have you found Fa'hradin's lamp and placed it in Malor's personal chambers?
keywords.permission: You are welcome to trade with Alesar and Yaman whenever you want to, !
keywords.work: Have you found Fa'hradin's lamp and placed it in Malor's personal chambers?
keywords.mission: Have you found Fa'hradin's lamp and placed it in Malor's personal chambers?

texts: Greetings, human . My patience with your kind is limited, so speak quickly and choose your words well.
I am the true leader of all djinn - perhaps not by birth, but certainly by merit. One day all djinn will come to recognise that I alone deserve to be king.

greetingPatterns.response: Greetings, human %N. My patience with your kind is limited, so speak quickly and choose your words well.

entries.response: Well, listen. We are trying to acquire the ultimate weapon to defeat Gabel: Fa'hradin's lamp! ...
Well well, human. So you really have made it - you have smuggled the modified lamp into Gabel's bedroom! ...
